summary: Comprehensive testing of Lux Studio admin portal and public gallery completed. All core features working correctly including admin authentication, event CRUD operations with is_published field, and public event visibility.

configuration_issues.details: Missing environment variables: CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_API_KEY, CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET

minor_issues.issue: Date field cannot be filled programmatically in tests
minor_issues.details: Field works manually but test automation has issues with date picker

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@luxstudio.com / Admin123!)
Event creation with is_published field toggle
Event detail shows is_published status correctly (green 'Published' badge)
GET /api/events returns events with is_published field
POST /api/events creates event with is_published field
GET /api/public/events returns only published events (3 events found)
Published events visible in public gallery
Event CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)

success_percentage.backend: 95% (18/19 tests passed - only Cloudinary config issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Add Cloudinary environment variables (CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_API_KEY, CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET) to /app/backend/.env to enable photo upload functionality. All other features are working correctly.
